name: Big Bob's Shoulder of Venison
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the venison with the spices, rubbing them in lightly. Spread the butter on the meat, covering it completely. Place the roast in an 8-inch x 13-inch roasting pan and cover with the onions.
2. Combine the beer, sour cream, and soup in a bowl and whisk until blended. Pour this mixture over the roast.
3. Bake in a 300°F oven for 1-1/2 hours until the meat is fork tender (adding small amounts of water if necessary). Thicken the pan drippings for gravy if desired. Serve with noodles, rice, or potatoes. This recipe makes a tough cut very tender, and leftovers make great sandwiches.
